title: Component
description: Metadata about a main component in a Figma file. Components are reusable design elements.

key.description: The globally unique key of the component.

description.description: The description of the component as entered in the editor.

componentSetId.description: The ID of the component set this component belongs to, if any.

documentationLinks.description: An array of documentation links attached to this component.

remote.description: Whether this component is a remote component that was pulled from an external library.
